name: @jeswr/agent-authz-verifier
description: The composed FOUR-PHASE agent-authorization delegation-chain verifier — the standalone, independently-checkable keystone of the accountable-agents stack. Verifies a presented chain of AgentAuthorizationCredentials + bound ODRL delegation policies FAIL-CLOSED across assembly → Phase A (credential integrity at one instant, incl. the signed policy-content digest) → Phase B (issuer↔subject↔assigner cross-binding + delegation linkage) → Phase C (status ∪ revocation) → Phase D (the ODRL agent-delegation chain walk), plus the D9 identity-composition rule. Pure and side-effect-free: ALL network enters through the injected resolveKey / isControlledBy / resolveStatus seams — the package itself does zero I/O and zero RDF parsing. Composes @jeswr/solid-vc + @jeswr/solid-odrl. Experimental, AI-agent-generated.
author: Jesse Wright
